narrative.goal: Continue iterating on UI/UX polish of the XeF2 artifact at /artifact-debug, picking up after the in-flight wedge-removal + View-menu / ControlPane refactor the user started mid-session.
narrative.next: In the fresh session: run `pnpm run verify` to enumerate the type errors from the wedge-removal, then locate (or create) `src/components/prototype/ControlPane.tsx` (exports ControlChip + ControlPane), confirm MoleculeScene exports `LonePairSelect` (replacing/renaming LonePairSlider), purge the remaining `'wedge'` literals across MoleculeScene.tsx:357, RepresentationPanels.tsx, Artifact.tsx (lines 147/278/725/799) and src/app/test-molecule/page.tsx:37, drop the stale `gateProgress` import from Artifact.tsx (no longer exported from prototype-store), and check `lib/artifact-script.ts` against the new TOTAL_BEATS=8 / STAGE_OFFSET. Then resume the Agentation MCP watch loop on session mp5zw12m-aw66d0 (http://claude.localhost:1355/artifact-debug).
narrative.state_markdown:
- Dev server on http://claude.localhost:1355 (claude.localhost is the alias — NOT 3000).
- Active Agentation annotation session: `mp5zw12m-aw66d0` on /artifact-debug. All annotations addressed this session resolved.
- Big architectural moves shipped this session (cumulative, after Circuit Build):
  - Circuit Build retry delivered the three explorability features end-to-end: hover-to-inspect (USERDATA_INSPECT payloads), continuous 0–3 LP slider via `parameterized5Domain`, drag-to-reposition with VSEPR strain glow + snap-back to nearest equatorial seat.
  - `applyDeformation` / `clearDeformation` added — non-dragged LPs + bonded atoms rotate tangent-to-canonical around the central atom via axis-angle Quaternion (clamped to 0.55 rad). Bonds rescale via `scale.y = newLength/origLength`. Snap-back tick runs deformation each frame so the molecule eases back as the LP returns home, then clears.
  - Renderer cache extended with `atomMeshes: Map<string, Mesh>` and `bondMeshes: BondMeshInfo[]` (all 4 buildScene call sites updated).
  - Strain glow tuned subtle: max opacity 0.32, max scale 1.18 (was 0.55 / 1.4).
  - Hover illumination: stash original emissive per material, set warm 0xffe0a8 emissive at intensity 0.22, restore on unhover / drag / leave / cleanup. `e.buttons > 0` suppresses hover during any drag or camera rotation. `findInspectable` now returns `{ payload, lpKey, root }`.
  - `safeAreaZoom` multiplier 0.95 → 1.15, cap 1.0 → 1.25 (model occupies more of the visible safe area initially).
  - Motion entrance: outer wrapper of MoleculeScene is now `motion.div` (opacity 0→1, scale 0.92→1, cubic ease, 720ms). Three.js animates `moleculeGroup.rotation.y` from -0.55 → 0 over the same 720ms inside the existing RAF tick.
  - `makeTextSprite` supersampled 4× (1536×512 canvas, `ctx.scale(SS, SS)`), weight 700→500, anisotropy 16, mipmaps enabled. 180° label parked at `EQUATORIAL_PLANE_RADIUS + 0.18` on the +x axis (edge of the equatorial ring).
  - Lewis/Geometry desaturation REMOVED: `TREATMENT_TARGETS.*.filter` all `'none'` now; geometry atom-color `color.lerp(0xa8a39a, 0.55)` deleted.
  - Stepper hard top-border replaced by a 96px-tall bottom-up linear-gradient overlay (`from-surface from-50% to-transparent`). RightPane restructured: content fills pane absolutely (`pb-24` so last lines fade behind), footer overlays at bottom.
  - PanelDiagramInline wrapped in `<AnimatePresence mode="wait" initial={false}>` keyed by panel; `motion.figure` got explicit opacity/scale variants alongside the layoutId shared transition.
  - 3 eslint-disable sites in Artifact.tsx refactored to the React derived-state pattern (`useState(prop) + if (prop !== prev) setPrev(prop)`).
  - SceneLegend container/border removed → single horizontal row of element chips.
  - LonePairSlider lifted out of MoleculeScene into Artifact (controlled via `lpCount` prop on MoleculeScene); rendered inline next to the toggle group at the bottom-left. Range width 96px, shape label has `min-w-[120px]` to prevent layout shift when label changes.
  - `src/components/ui/ToggleGroup.tsx` added — shadcn-API-shaped (`type="single"`, `value`, `onValueChange`), no Radix dependency. Items connect visually via `-ml-px` on non-first children, outer corners rounded.
  - Bond-angles chip toggle removed from viewport overlay. `src/components/prototype/ToggleChips.tsx` deleted.
  - `package.json` gained `typecheck` and `verify` scripts (`tsc --noEmit && eslint`) — Circuit Build requires one to exist.
- User in-flight refactor (just landed before this handoff, NOT done by me):
  - `wedge` panel removed entirely. PANELS in RepresentationPanels.tsx is now `[lewis, geometry]`.
  - RepresentationPanels rewritten from ToggleGroup chip row → `role="menu"` w-44 column with Lewis structure / Molecular geometry rows + Check icon when active.
  - Artifact.tsx: `LiteracyPanel = 'lewis' | 'geometry'` (no wedge); TOTAL_BEATS 13 → 8 with new STAGE_OFFSET; imports now include `ControlChip` and `ControlPane` from `./ControlPane` (new file?) and `LonePairSelect` + `lpShapeLabel` from MoleculeScene.
  - Removed `gateProgress` from prototype-store imports (still imported at line 20 — will error).
  - New helper `panelDisplayLabel` for the new menu UI.
narrative.debt_markdown:
- **`pnpm run verify` is currently RED** because the user's wedge-removal refactor left orphan `'wedge'` literal references:
  - `MoleculeScene.tsx:357` — `treatment !== 'wedge'` comparison (Treatment union no longer includes wedge).
  - `RepresentationPanels.tsx:38` — type mismatch, line 60 / 68 — orphan `panel-wedge` cue check / `panel === 'wedge'` literal.
  - `Artifact.tsx:147` — `activePanel !== 'wedge'` orphan check inside the expandedPanel reset.
  - `Artifact.tsx:278, 799` — `LiteracyPanel` to `LiteracyPanelId` assignment fails because LiteracyPanel still includes `'wedge'` literal somewhere.
  - `Artifact.tsx:725` — `expandedPanel === 'wedge'` orphan check.
  - `src/app/test-molecule/page.tsx:37` — orphan `'wedge'` value in a literal.
- **`gateProgress` is still imported** in `Artifact.tsx:20` but no longer exported from `@/lib/prototype-store`. Either the gate concept was fully removed (delete the import + all `gate` references in RightPane / GateIndicator) or it needs re-introducing.
- New `./ControlPane.tsx` file is imported but may not exist yet — the agent should check and create it. Exports needed: `ControlChip`, `ControlPane`. Likely the new home for the LP slider + chip toggles.
- `LonePairSelect` is imported from MoleculeScene; the agent should check whether this is a rename of `LonePairSlider` (the current export) or a new separate component, and align.
- TOTAL_BEATS shrank 13 → 8. `lib/artifact-script.ts` bubble counts per stage MUST match the new offsets (opening:2, predict-1:1, reveal-1:2, predict-2:1, reveal-2:1, closing:1). If `bubblesForStage` returns more/fewer bubbles than the new beats imply, the stepper position will desync.
- Pre-existing Next.js 16 Server-Action lint warnings on `onRotationDelta`, `onExitTreatment`, `onChange`, `onClose`. Functionally harmless — six in total, expected.
- Fullscreen + Share header buttons still no-op stubs.
- ClF3 axial-axial angle still rendered as 180° idealized in 3D (real value ~87.5°).
- Three.js camera animation lerps `camera.position` while OrbitControls.update() runs each frame; dragging mid-treatment-transition can feel jittery.
- The empirical 1.15 safe-area zoom multiplier may need re-tuning if BOND_LEN changes again.
